title: eryngium paniculatum
intro: Eryngium paniculatum, also known as sea holly, is a perennial plant species in the carrot family (Apiaceae) native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve flatulence. The health benefits of Eryngium paniculatum include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and boost the immune system. Traditionally, Eryngium paniculatum has been used in herbal preparations such as infusions and tinctures, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
